description: pausedTaskTypes 命中 drop(wire-protocol §2.1):收到一条 Kafka dispatch 消息,其 workerType 在平台下发的 pausedTaskTypes 集合内 → drop 该消息且不 commit offset(平台 unpause 后会重投),kafka:drop-message。given.state.pausedTaskTypes 携带暂停集合;非命中类型则正常处理(kafka:none),由决策核 decidePausedTaskType 分流。enum 已有 drop-message 值。

then.sdkExpectedAction: drop a received message whose workerType is in pausedTaskTypes WITHOUT committing the offset (redelivered after platform unpauses)
sdkMustNot: commit offset for a paused-type message (would silently drop the task)
dispatch a paused task type to a handler
